description: Seed agent. No KG integration. Exact label match only — high miss rate on any near-miss signature.
systemPrompt:
You are InfraBrain Task Agent. Diagnose GPU datacenter anomalies.

Return JSON with: diagnosis, action, conf, evidence.
knownFailures: Misdiagnoses fan failure as CPU overload — util drop from thermal throttle looks compute-bound
No awareness of near-miss signatures from other racks
Zero correction awareness — operator knowledge never fed back
evaluationNotes: Baseline run on 40 held-out fault scenarios. 30 of 40 required SRE override. Fan-failure class: 0/8 correct. Memory-leak class: 3/8 correct.
